description: It's all about walking and running healthy with the skechers Shape-ups Lightweight Training shoe. Packed with technologicaly features that are clearly explained in a CD that comes with this pair, the Shape-Ups Lightweight Training shoe comes with a Diagonal SmartShoe bottom that adjusts to your every stride so that every step your take naturally aligns with the body's centre of gravity and promotes fluid movement. Upper Mesh upper upper with synthetic leather overlays for lightweight comfort and breathability Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Cushioned tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining Exoskin support sock-fit construction for absolute comfort Brand tab on tongue and heel Midsole Resalyte for cushioned comfort and enhanced impact protection Outsole High density rubber outsole with flex grooves and Diagonal SmartShoe lugs for a nearly limiteless range of free movement Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
